nasb.text: Then the officers who were over the thousands of the army, the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds, approached Moses,

esv.text: Then the officers who were over the thousands of the army, the commanders of thousands and the commanders of hundreds, came near to Moses

cnv.text: 統領萬軍的軍長、千夫長和百夫長，都來見摩西，

ccb.text: 统领军队的千夫长和百夫长来见摩西，
